name: Farnham Ribblemead
description: A sage and lover of books who has gone missing under mysterious circumstances.
notes: Was seen reading a letter that may have prompted him to enter the woods.
Disappeared under similar circumstances to Emelda.
One of three people who have gone missing, possibly linked to the strange pipe music.
Sidewich Maldwort of the Man of Gold apothecary knew him and describes him as a linguist.
